case_title: MICHAEL CORNER VS. PARAGON SYSTEMS, INC.,

docket_entries.description: REQUEST THAT CLERK ENTER JUDGMENT ON FINAL ORDER, DECISION OR AWARD OF THE LABOR COMMISSIONER FILED BY PLAINTIFF CORNER, MICHAEL AS TO DEFENDANT PARAGON SYSTEMS, INC., A FOREIGN CORPORATION JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
